RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0009 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Diego Patel Date of Birth: 10/10/1984 SSN (tokenized): TKN-460135 Annual Income: $136,000 Loan Amount: $59,000 Branch: Leeds Employment: [x] Full-time [x] Self-employed Housing: [x] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN10562AL Tesla Leaf 2020 EV CPO 33,000 Authorized Signature: Diego Patel
